pred_reason: SWC-101 is applicable due to identified critical missing access controls on state-changing functions (Task 12), allowing unauthorized modifications. SWC-107 is justified as reflection calculations (Task 7) were found vulnerable to edge cases with arithmetic issues despite SafeMath usage. Evidence: Task 12 finding confirms missing access controls on state-changing functions; Task 7 identifies reflection calculation vulnerabilities with extreme values; High severity impacts support both SWC classifications
